full_text:
Zuo Ci (Yuanfang) 左慈 (元放)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zuo Ci (左慈), styledYuanfang (元放), was born in Lujiang. Taoist named ‘Master Black Horn’. Trained in the occult at Emei Mountain. Zuo Ci was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zuo Ci lived during the Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
